notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Marcelo Mayer.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Matt Olson. Masataka Yoshida scores. Mickey Gasper to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Matt Olson. Masataka Yoshida scores. Mickey Gasper to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela singles on a line drive to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Marcelo Mayer scores. Isiah Kiner-Falefa scores. Jarren Duran to 3rd. Fielding error by catcher Chadwick Tromp.

notableEvents.label: Mauricio Dubón reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Marcelo Mayer.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies grounds into a double play, third baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to second baseman Nick Sogard to first baseman Willson Contreras. Mauricio Dubón out at 2nd. Ozzie Albies out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ozzie Albies rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ozzie Albies grounds into a double play, third baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to second baseman Nick Sogard to first baseman Willson Contreras. Mauricio Dubón out at 2nd. Ozzie Albies out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Sogard singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Bryce Elder. Nick Sogard to 3rd. Nick Sogard advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Bryce Elder.
